results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end
Fed's Interest Rate Decision: April 29, 2026 | Seeking Alpha
Fed holds rates steady, Chair Powell to remain with low profile

summary: April 29, 2026: FOMC held rates at 3.5%-3.75% (third consecutive hold following three consecutive cuts in 2025). Unusual 8-4 dissent. Inflation elevated partly due to global energy prices. Powell's effective final meeting as chair; will remain as governor with low profile.
